subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: With respect to this plot of land which thou didst purchase, thou must not alter thy purpose, for in this matter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این قطعه زمین را که خریده بودی باید نیت خود را تغییر ندهی زیرا در این امر
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @business; financial; property matters
